exercises.name: Knee Flexion Exercise
exercises.description: Basic knee flexion for post-surgery rehabilitation

warmupSteps.text: Sit comfortably with your back supported
warmupSteps.audioText: Sit comfortably with your back supported. Make sure you're in a stable position.
Take three deep breaths to relax. Breathe in through your nose, out through your mouth.

steps.audioText: Slowly lift your right leg. Keep your knee straight.
Now bend your knee to about 45 degrees. Move slowly and controlled.
Straighten your leg slowly. Control the movement.
Lower your leg back down to the starting position.
Great! Now let's repeat with your left leg.

cooldownSteps.audioText: Relax both legs. Let them rest naturally.
Take a few deep breaths. You did great!

exercises.name: Shoulder Flexion Exercise
exercises.description: Basic shoulder flexion for rotator cuff rehabilitation

steps.audioText: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Keep your posture straight.
Slowly raise your right arm forward to shoulder height. Keep your elbow straight.
Lower your arm slowly back to your side. Control the movement.
Good! Now repeat with your left arm.
Complete ten repetitions with each arm. Take your time.

exercises.name: Basic Squat
exercises.description: Fundamental squat exercise for lower body strength

steps.audioText: Stand with your feet hip-width apart. Toes pointing slightly outward.

steps.text: Lower your body by bending knees
steps.audioText: Lower your body by bending your knees. Keep your back straight and chest up.

steps.text: Go down until thighs are parallel
steps.audioText: Go down until your thighs are parallel to the ground. Don't let your knees go past your toes.
Push through your heels to stand back up. Squeeze your glutes at the top.
Complete ten repetitions. Focus on form over speed.

exercises.name: Single Leg Balance
exercises.description: Balance exercise for ankle and knee stability

steps.text: Stand near a wall for support
steps.audioText: Stand near a wall for support if needed. Start with your feet together.

steps.text: Lift your right foot off the ground
steps.audioText: Lift your right foot off the ground. Balance on your left leg.
Good! Now switch. Balance on your right leg.
Repeat three times per leg. Try to hold steady.

exercises.name: Hip Abduction
exercises.description: Hip strengthening exercise for lateral stability

steps.audioText: Lie on your left side with your legs straight. Support your head with your left arm.
Lift your right leg upward about 45 degrees. Keep your leg straight.
Lower your leg slowly back down. Don't let it touch your other leg.
Complete fifteen repetitions on this side.
Great! Now switch to your right side and repeat.
